title: team-research reference implementation discussion
summary: Maintainers describe a lightweight team-research workflow that keeps source notes, architectural decisions, and verification commands in one repository so handoffs remain reviewable.
relevance: Shows why the team-research project should preserve cited evidence beside the ADR and harness contract.

title: Small-team research synthesis practices for team-research
summary: The article recommends short evidence records, explicit decision logs, and repeatable smoke checks for small product teams turning research into implementation plans.
relevance: Supports Project Forge's team-research output shape: evidence.jsonl, ADR-0001-stack.md, project-forge.yaml, docs/harness.md, and a handoff.
